title: YOLO - (You Only Live Once) Lyrics Anegan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
YOLO - (You Only Live Once)
Singer(s):Shail Hada, Ramya NSK, Richard, MC Vickey, Eden
Lyrics:C. S. Amudhan

Podhumda saami unga
nine to five poraattam
kaanji pona sedikku thaevai
niraya neerottam.

Bloody maari unna kalakattaa
..ice tea-il kulikkattaa
paalum thaenum odum ooril
vazhndhu paarpomaa

aadi paadi odi kalaikkaadhey
konjam kooda adhu salikkaadhey
indru poyi naalai vandhaal
edhuvum kidaikkaadhey

Yolo yolo
yolo yolo
you only live once thaaney (2)

Vennilaaa vazhkkai konjam
spicea kalappomaa
aasai ennum kadalil
moolgi amudham kadaivomaa

mudi mudi nu mudikkanum
kanna moodi shots adikkanum
kadhal nesam onndrum illa
inbam indru mattum

Koottu kootu theeya moottanum
sikki mukki pola urasanum
thalaikku mela vellam ponaal
adhil enna paavam

Yolo yolo
yolo yolo
you only live once machaan (2)

holaa
inga kotththu parottavum
barbecue-kkum serndha oru kalavai.
konjam ginger beer-a hallivachi
jillu beera ooththu baby.

hey rasaaththi, munnaadi vaadi
idu valachi nelichi
mayakkiputtu podi.
kannukulla nachunu muththam
onnu thaadi
ada innum oruvaatti
en mayilae variyaadi

machaan I can come
if you roll on the muddy floor
mavanae never thought I'll be
so much in control.

dirty friends, cocky dudes
all the slutty girls
watche-em all play
sex box on the shore.

acham madam naanam
edhukkuthaaney
vetkam oliyudhu
anaikkathaaney.
thottaalum vittaalum
adhu pogum kaaththula

shut up and take ass down
idhu namma neramdaa

Kattru veesa, kangal mooda
tholil saaya ennai tholaiththaene
kuliril verkka, viralgal korkka
idhalgal serkka
povom vinmaeley

Yolo yolo
yolo yolo
you only live once
you only live once
in a life time.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'YOLO'?

The song 'YOLO' emphasizes the idea of living life to the fullest, encouraging listeners to embrace every moment.

How does 'YOLO' fit into the plot of Anegan?

In Anegan, 'YOLO' reflects the carefree and adventurous spirit of the characters, highlighting their journey and experiences.

Who are the artists behind the song?

The song features the talented singers Ramya NSK and Shail Hada, with lyrics by CS Amudhan and music composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'YOLO' released?

'YOLO' was released on November 10, 2014, as part of the Anegan soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'YOLO - (You Only Live Once)' from the movie Anegan is a vibrant celebration of life and spontaneity. It encapsulates the carefree attitude of youth, urging listeners to seize the day and enjoy every moment. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, the song evokes feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for parties and celebrations. The collaboration between Ramya NSK and Shail Hada adds a unique flavor, enhancing the overall energetic vibe of the track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: YOLO - (You Only Live Once) from Anegan is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the essence of living life to the fullest. With a dynamic collaboration between the vibrant vocals of Ramya NSK and Shail Hada, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious energy and catchy beats that make this song a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: It's enough, God. Your nine-to-five struggle needs a lot of water to survive.
Like a bloody mess, should I dip you in ice tea? Let's see how we live in this town.
Don't just sing and run; don't even let it go. If today goes, tomorrow won't bring anything.
YOLO, YOLO, YOLO, YOLO, you only live once.
In life, let's mix a little spice. Shall we dive into the ocean of desires and find sweetness?
We need to finish things off, close our eyes, and take shots. There's no love or joy today.
Gather together, let’s have a blast. If the rain falls on the head, what’s the harm in that?
YOLO, YOLO, YOLO, YOLO, you only live once, buddy.
Hey, here’s a mix of parotta and barbecue. Let’s add some ginger beer and chill, baby.
Hey, darling, before this gets too serious, let’s enjoy it. I want to kiss you, but is anyone else coming?
Buddy, I can join if you roll on the muddy floor. I never thought I’d be so in control.
Dirty friends, cocky guys, all the wild girls watch. They all play around on the shore.
Why should I be scared or ashamed? It’s all about being bold. Whether in the garden or at home, it will all go away.
Why should I be scared or ashamed? It’s all about being bold.
Shut up and get down; this is our time.
The wind blows, eyes close, work fades away. I’m lost in the coolness, fingers touch, and we’ll all blend together in the sky.
YOLO, YOLO, YOLO, YOLO, you only live once, you only live once in a lifetime.
